name: USS Tattnall (DD 125)
events: 16 Jun 1942 USS Tatnall and USS Erie pick up 93 survivors from the American Lebore that was torpedoed and sunk on 14 June 1942 by German U-boat U-172 about 200 miles north of Cristobal, Panama in position 12°53'N, 80°40'W.
Among these 93 survivors were 49 survivors from the Dutch merchant Crijnssen.
